label: Stamp sandbox workspace
command: /repo\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m library.app_factory sandbox-stamp --run-id demonstration_first_run --template-id ui_explorer_workbench --sandbox-root /workspace/apps --name "Demo App v1.0" --vendor-mode module_ref --resolution-profile app_ready --force

text: "description": "A standalone file system tree viewer widget.",
